sql_array: CREATE TABLE sample_table (id INT, text_column CLOB(100));
INSERT INTO sample_table (id, text_column) VALUES (1, 'This is a test string for CLOB');
UPDATE sample_table SET text_column = CLOB(50, 'Updated test string for CLOB') WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, text_column FROM sample_table WHERE LENGTH(text_column) > 20;
SELECT id FROM sample_table WHERE text_column LIKE '%test%';
